title: elaeocarpus angustipes
intro: Elaeocarpus angustipes, also known as the Chinese holly or small blueberry ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus angustipes include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for various health conditions. Elaeocarpus angustipes is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
